title: Umeå, Västerbotten — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Umeå, Västerbotten: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Umeå is a city in Västerbotten with a population of 128,000. A vibrant university city in northern Sweden, known for its birch trees, music scene, and Arctic research.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
